steps.name: Project Scaffolding & API Discovery
steps.description: Set up Rust WASM project structure (Cargo.toml, capabilities.json, WIT file, src/lib.rs skeleton). Discover/confirm Zencoder HTTP API endpoints. Verify cargo check passes.

steps.name: Core Infrastructure & Validation
steps.description: Implement constants, all validation helpers (UUID, length, status, schedule), URL encoding, ZencoderAction enum (17 variants), supporting types, api_request() with retry logic, Tool trait impl (execute dispatcher, schema placeholder, description). Unit tests for all validation/encoding functions.

steps.name: Action Handlers — Projects, Tasks & Workflows
steps.description: Implement 7 handler functions: list_projects, get_project, create_task, list_tasks, get_task, update_task, list_workflows. Wire into execute() match arms. Each validates inputs, builds API path, calls api_request().

steps.name: Action Handlers — Plans & Automations
steps.description: Implement 8 handler functions: get_plan, create_plan, update_plan_step, add_plan_steps, list_automations, create_automation, toggle_automation, list_task_automations. Wire into execute() match arms.

steps.name: Convenience Actions, JSON Schema & Comprehensive Tests
steps.description: Implement derive_title, solve_coding_problem, check_solution_status convenience actions. Complete SCHEMA const (oneOf for all 17 actions). Comprehensive unit tests for derive_title and all action deserialization.

steps.name: Build Verification & Security Review
steps.description: Run cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy, cargo test, cargo build --target wasm32-wasip1 --release. Check WASM binary size. Verify security checklist (no secrets in WASM, UUID validation, length bounds, URL encoding, allowlist, no DELETE, rate limits, safe errors, no unsafe, no panics).
